block_23: Without a doubt, tournaments are great for motivating traders to engage with the IQ Option platform and see everything it has to offer. That’s why we offer multiple tournaments at once. This month, one of them is absolutely free. You read that correctly ⁠⁠— FREE!
block_28: The last tournament we’d like to highlight is short and sweet, and it is likely to attract traders who prefer a faster way of making profit.
block_34: It’s pretty simple: each participant gets a tournament account with the same amount of money, initial conditions being equal for all traders.
block_35: The winner is the trader who finishes with the most money on the tournament account. Usually, the prize pool is divided among the best traders, ranging from 9 to 30 people depending on the tournament. In some tournaments, traders have the option to rebuy once or multiple times to extend their participation.
